US Vice President JD Vance, alongside Jared Kushner and Steve Witkoff, announced the breakdown of 21-hour negotiations in Islamabad after Iran rejected US demands, including ending uranium enrichment and dismantling nuclear facilities.[2][4][5] Vanc
